purpose: Integrator instructions: everything the shared collision roots need for /console/equipment. This lane never edited nav.ts, registry.ts, or ko.ts.

component.note: Prop-free ComponentType adapter (resolves branch via useActiveBranchId; renders a truthful no-branch status when the session has no branches claim). EquipmentConsoleRoute({branchId}) also exists for a parameterized mount.

web/src/console/shell/nav.ts.note: Mount as development inventory. Do NOT add to EXPOSED_SCREEN_KEYS: exposure requires the ADR-0025 evidence approval and the merged equipment-3r backend.
Deny-by-omission: visible only to sessions whose roles or feature grants intersect. equipment_3r_observe is the backend feature-catalog key for the module's read tier.

web/src/i18n/ko.ts.note: Nav label only. All module strings live module-owned in web/src/i18n/equipment.ts (see i18n.json).

authz.model: deny-by-default PBAC; server is sole enforcer

transport.followup: Raw fetch against the design contract. Once openapi.yaml lands the 14 equipment-3r operations and clients/ts regenerates, swap to the generated ConsoleApiClient paths (noted in the module file header).
